title: Elbow Grease Stubborn Stain Remover Bar - Removes Stubborn Stains From Laundry | No Bleach (100g Bar)
features: REMOVES THE TOUGHEST STAINS: Whether it's an ink mark, oil spill, or red wine disaster, this stain remover bar tackles even the most stubborn stains. Keep it handy in your laundry cupboard for a quick fix to clothing mishaps. Ideal for households with kids, pets, or anyone prone to spills!

NO BLEACH, NO HARSH CHEMICALS: This stain remover is bleach-free, making it gentle on both fabrics and your skin. It’s perfect for households looking for safer, kinder alternatives to tough chemical cleaners. Ideal for anyone with sensitive skin or delicate fabrics.

ENZYME POWERED FORMULA FOR EFFECTIVE CLEANING: The powerful enzymes in this bar break down stains quickly and easily, so you don’t have to scrub endlessly. From everyday dirt to difficult stains, this laundry essential cuts through grime without damaging fabrics.

EASY TO USE - JUST RUB ON THE STAIN: No need for sprays or complicated steps. Simply wet the fabric and rub the bar directly onto the stain. Its compact size makes it easy to use in a hurry, whether you’re at home or travelling.

A LAUNDRY ESSENTIAL FOR EVERY HOUSEHOLD: From muddy footprints to cooking splatters, this versatile stain remover is an absolute must-have in any home. Tuck it into your laundry routine for effortless stain removal every time.

WORKS ON BOTH FRESH & SET-IN STAINS: Treat stains right away for the best results, but this handy stain remover can even work on those older, stubborn stains that have set into your clothes. Great for forgotten messes that need a quick rescue!

IDEAL FOR PRE-TREATING STAINS BEFORE WASHING: Don’t let stains set in – use this bar as a pre-wash treatment to give your laundry a head start. It’s perfect for removing tough stains from clothing before they go into the wash.

COMPACT & PORTABLE: Take this small but mighty stain remover with you when travelling or heading to work. It’s great for emergency stain treatments, whether you’re at home, in the office, or on the road.
SAFE FOR MOST FABRICS, BUT ALWAYS TEST FIRST: Gentle enough for most fabrics, but always remember to test on a small, hidden area first. Avoid rubbing too hard, and not suitable for wool or silk.

FAST & FUSS-FREE CLEANING SOLUTION: No need for fancy sprays or detergents – this simple bar does the job quickly and effectively. It’s a fuss-free addition to your laundry and cleaning routine that you’ll wonder how you lived without!
description: Product Description Looking for a powerful yet gentle solution to tackle tough stains? The Elbow Grease Stain Remover Bar is the perfect answer. Say goodbye to the frustration of stubborn stains with this handy little bar that’s ready to save your laundry from unsightly spots. Whether it's a wine spill, a grass stain from an outdoor adventure, or a coffee mishap on your favourite shirt, this stain remover for clothes is a household essential that should be in every laundry kit. With its enzyme-powered formula and no bleach, it’s tough on stains but kind to your fabrics, making it a versatile choice for your laundry & cleaning routine. Rub this convenient stain remover bar directly onto the stain, and watch it work its magic. It’s great for pre-treating stains before washing, and it’s small enough to take on the go. Whether you’re at home or out and about, the Elbow Grease Stain Remover Bar is the ultimate companion for keeping your clothes fresh and clean. Forget complicated treatments or harsh chemicals – this no-nonsense bar is all you need to remove stubborn stains in just a few easy steps. Ingredients Stain bar
